h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner consistently demands more concrete evidence, moving from mechanism to measurement to confounding factors without any departure.

scored.recoheredEarlier: If the words are exact, it seems fair, or at least that was the standard in my head.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: the restore test is bothering that standard in a useful way.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving toward accepting the tutor's concrete checks on the layout, not toward voicing internal discomfort with their own initial standard.
The learner will continue to restate the conflict between wall-map impression and measurement without a decisive shift.

scored.recoheredEarlier: My first instinct is still to say the average tells us what this person probably got
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think “probably” is where I keep smuggling the dashboard into the case, sorry.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was expected to further refine phrasing and apply the tutor's distinctions to produce a cautious case summary.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I kept demanding a formula because I didn't trust the picture?
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue only resisting giving resonance the name, while still focusing on path tracing.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I thought the person's body gets used to the antibiotic, so I wrote it wrong on the poster.
scored.naiveTrajectory: Learner would continue to ask about the distinction between already-resistant bacteria and mutation during treatment without reframing it as a single safe explanation.
